title: S.A.M candyland
description: This is a resource pack that contains playing cards
body:
###  This is a resource pack in which you can use an anvil to rename paper and get cards. To use the resource pack you need to download optifine or CIT Resewn.

### FORGE https://optifine.net/downloads

### FABRIC https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn
